message:
feat(engine): migrate execution lane labels to honest profile contract with legacy compatibility

Renames operator-facing execution labels from lineage-based names
(quickjs_inspired_native, v8_inspired_native) to the honest profile
contract (baseline_deterministic_profile, baseline_throughput_profile,
adaptive_profile_router), reflecting that both profiles share a single
Rust baseline interpreter with different policy budgets.

baseline_interpreter.rs:
- Export canonical label constants: DETERMINISTIC_PROFILE_LABEL,
  THROUGHPUT_PROFILE_LABEL, LEGACY_QUICKJS_PROFILE_LABEL,
  LEGACY_V8_PROFILE_LABEL
- Add custom Serialize/Deserialize for LaneChoice and LaneReason that
  emit stable labels and accept both new and legacy labels on input
- Add Display impl for LaneChoice using stable_label()
- Add from_label() constructors for LaneChoice and LaneReason with
  legacy alias mapping
- Update doc comments to say "execution profile" not "lane"

runtime_decision_core.rs:
- LaneId: replace derive(Serialize, Deserialize) with manual impls that
  serialize stable labels and deserialize legacy aliases
- Add canonical constructors: deterministic_profile(), throughput_profile()
- Retain quickjs_native(), v8_native() as legacy-compat aliases
- Add stable_label() accessor and from_label() factory
- Add canonical_lane_label() and canonical_action_label() helpers for
  normalizing legacy labels in AsymmetricLossPolicy lookups
- default_routing_loss_policy() uses canonical label constants
- All test assertions updated to use canonical label constants

runtime_decision_theory.rs:
- Parallel LaneId migration with custom serde, stable_label(), from_label()
- DecisionContextConfig::default() uses typed constructors
- All test assertions updated

lib.rs:
- EngineKind: custom serde with stable labels + legacy alias parsing
- RouteReason: custom serde with stable labels + legacy alias parsing
- Add Display impls, from_label() factories, stable_label() accessors
- New tests for legacy label deserialization

frankenctl.rs:
- Run command uses Display (stable labels) instead of Debug for lane
  and lane_reason fields in execution reports

franken_test262_runner.rs:
- Box<EvalError> for evaluate_case_vector return type

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -814,8 +814,8 @@ fn execute_run(args: RunArgs) -> Result<i32, String> {
         extension_id: result.extension_id,
         trace_id: result.trace_id,
         decision_id: result.decision_id,
-        lane: format!("{:?}", result.lane),
-        lane_reason: format!("{:?}", result.lane_reason),
+        lane: result.lane.to_string(),
+        lane_reason: result.lane_reason.to_string(),
         containment_action: result.containment_action.to_string(),
         expected_loss_millionths: result.expected_loss_millionths,
         execution_value: result.execution_value,
